dm_location: Chapter 15 — Development Management Standards (Written Statement, Volume 1)
sightline_y: 215 m (national 100 km/h); 160 m (regional 85 km/h); 120 m (local primary); 90 m (local secondary/tertiary); 70/50/35 m at 70/60/42 km/h
wastewater_standard: EPA Code of Practice — Wastewater Treatment and Disposal Systems Serving Single Houses (PE10) 2021
residential_density_dph: Per Sustainable Residential Development and Compact Settlements Guidelines 2024 (no fixed table); max 15 units/ha on 'Proposed Residential B' lands
car_parking_dwelling: Dwelling: 2 per unit; Apartment (1-2 bed): 1.5 per unit; Apartment (3-4 bed): 2 per unit (maxima)
trigger_AA: Required when proposal could impact qualifying interest of a European (Natura 2000) site; NIS where screening cannot rule out significant adverse impact
trigger_EIA: EIAR for development exceeding mandatory Schedule 5 thresholds; sub-threshold EIAR where determined necessary
trigger_FRA: Site-specific FRA in flood risk areas; sequential approach + Justification Test (Highly vulnerable: JT in Zone A and B; Less vulnerable: JT in Zone A)
trigger_AHIA: Architectural Impact Assessment; works to/in vicinity of protected structures per PSP 1 (15.3.1)
trigger_EcIA: Ecological/Biodiversity Impact Assessment among additional assessments
trigger_VIA: Visual Impact Assessment among additional assessments
trigger_TTA: Traffic and Transport Assessment, Quality Audit, Road Safety Audit among additional assessments
notes: No numeric rural minimum site area, separation distance, private open space %, plot ratio, site coverage or building height tabulated in Chapter 15. Sightline eye/object height 1.05m-2.0m. Childcare: 1 facility (min 20 places) for 75+ units.
